name: Lonsdale Quay Market
note: Great for a morning browse — fresh produce, local vendors, and views of the inlet.

name: Lynn Canyon Park
note: Free suspension bridge. Less crowded than Capilano, just as good.

name: Deep Cove
note: Rent a kayak or grab a Honey Doughnut and walk the cove.

name: Lighthouse Park
note: Old-growth forest that ends at the ocean. One of the best hikes near the city.

name: Spanish Banks
note: Best sunset spot in Vancouver. Go at low tide — the beach doubles in size.

name: Cypress Mountain Lookout
note: City skyline, ocean, and islands all in one frame. Park at the base and walk up.

name: Granville Island Public Market
note: Crowded but worth it. Fresh pasta and local cheese are non-negotiable.

name: Matchstick Coffee
note: Rotating single origins. The most honest cup in the city.

name: Nemesis Coffee
note: Good vibes, great flat white. The Yaletown location is the one.

name: Thierry
note: Pastries and espresso — the most European afternoon Vancouver offers.
